title: Script composition (my-scripts.json entry)
description: The canonical runtime form of one script in src/data/my-scripts.json. Character ids are ALWAYS the canonical hyphenated kebab-case form used by characters.json (e.g. 'bounty-hunter', 'plague-doctor', 'lord-of-typhon'), NOT the legacy no-hyphen form that appears in the jsons/ build source. Enforced by src/__tests__/data-integrity.test.js.

id.description: Slug; must equal the src/data/scripts/<id>.json preset filename.

name.description: Human name; must equal the jsons/<name>.json source filename (minus extension).

characters.description: Roster of canonical character ids. 13 townsfolk + 4 outsider + 4 minion + N demon (N=2 for Gentle Night, else 4). No Fabled, no Travellers, no duplicates. Every id must exist in characters.json.
